title: bidens diversa
intro: Bidens diversa, also known as the two-leaf biddens or two-leaved biddens, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China, India, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Bidens diversa has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or in the form of a tincture or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
